nasb.text: When He got out of the boat, immediately a man from the tombs with an unclean spirit met Him,

esv.text: And when Jesus had stepped out of the boat, immediately there met him out of the tombs a man with an unclean spirit.

cnv.text: 耶穌一下船，就有一個被污靈附著的人，從墓地裡迎面而來。

ccb.text: 耶稣刚下船，就遇见一个被污鬼附身的人从坟场迎面而来。

csbs.text: 耶稣刚下船，就有一个被污灵附身的人，从墓地迎着他来。
